response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) with a strong focus on developer tools, testing infrastructure, and system design, meeting the minimum requirements. While he lacks explicit mobile-platform experience and formal leadership titles (e.g., 'Engineering Manager'), his roles as Staff/ Senior Software Engineer and founder demonstrate technical leadership, people management (training, mentoring), and organizational change (e.g., refactoring dojos, CI/CD adoption). His open-source contributions to developer tooling (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial) align well with the role's focus on engineering productivity.
strengths: Deep experience in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and system design (e.g., MCP frameworks, AI-agent infrastructure, CI/CD setups).
Proven technical leadership through mentoring, workshops, and organizational initiatives (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course).
Strong technical foundation with diverse languages (DLang, TypeScript, C++, Java) and hands-on coding contributions.
concerns: Limited explicit people-management experience in formal leadership roles (e.g., no title like 'Engineering Manager' or 'Director').
Mobile-platform knowledge is missing (preferred but not required; may require ramp-up).
Recent experience (since 2021) is focused on general software engineering rather than developer tools/test infrastructure.

key_factors.factor: Technical leadership and developer tooling experience
People management and team development track record
